recent_projects.name: django-cfg
recent_projects.summary: Modern Django framework with type-safe Pydantic v2 configuration, Next.js admin integration, real-time WebSockets, and 8 enterprise apps. Replace settings.py with validated models, 90% less code. Production-ready with AI agents, auto-generated TypeScript clients, and zero-config features.
